leadText: The Float Stone (Japanese: かるいし Pumice Stone) is a type of held item introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Halves the weight of the holder. Autotomize is applied before other weight-modifying effects, including the Float Stone. A Pokémon's weight cannot be reduced below 0.1 kg. This has no effect on the Heavy Ball , which uses the Pokémon's species' weight rather than its current weight.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods B W Opelucid City B2 W2 Opelucid City , Twist Mountain Join Avenue ( Antique Shop ) DW * Rugged Mountain X Y Spiky rocks OR AS Rustboro City Secret Base ("Search for treasure" with Secret Pal ) S M US UM Wela Volcano Park US UM Battle Royal Dome (48 BP ), Poké Pelago (Isle Aphun - Brilliant-Stone Hunting, Interesting-Item Hunting) Sw Sh Bridge Field ( Digging Duo ) Sw Sh IA Cram-o-matic ( Rock : 2-20 points) Sw Sh CT Hidden recurring item ( Giant's Bed ) S V Sparkling overworld item ( South Province (Area Three) , South Province (Area Five) ) S V ID Sparkling overworld item ( Canyon Biome , Coastal Biome , Savanna Biome )

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 A very light stone. It reduces the weight of a Pokémon when held. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. This very light stone reduces the weight of a Pokémon when held. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. This very light stone reduces the weight of the holder.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS N/A $ 100 S M US UM Sw Sh N/A $ 2,000 S V N/A $ 2,500 In the Generation V games, the Float Stone can be sold to an item maniac inside the Icirrus City Pokémon Center for $ 1000. Effect [ edit | edit source ] Halves the weight of the holder. Autotomize is applied before other weight-modifying effects, including the Float Stone. A Pokémon's weight cannot be reduced below 0.1 kg. This has no effect on the Heavy Ball , which uses the Pokémon's species' weight rather than its current weight.
